name: M & m Cake (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sucanat (should be available in health food store or coop)
1 cup non-fat soy-milk (I used Health Valley Fat-Free Soy Moo)
3/4 cup dark molasses (I used Grandma's Molasses "robust flavor" with the green label)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon together in a large bowl.
2. Add Sucanat to the dry ingredients.
3. Add soy-milk, dark molasses, and maple syrup to the dry ingredients. Mix until well blended.
4. Bake in a large loaf pan at 275°F for 1 hour and 40 minutes.
5. Wrap tightly in plastic wrap and foil and let rest 5 days (in refrigerator) before cutting.
